user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new deduction, so that employees can declare eligible tax-saving investments
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Deductions screen; When I click Add / Edit Deduction and enter deduction name, category, max limit and remarks; Then the deduction is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing deduction, so that I can update its category, limit or remarks
acceptance_criteria: Given a deduction is listed; When I click Edit and modify its details; Then the changes are saved and reflected in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search deductions, so that I can quickly locate a specific deduction
acceptance_criteria: Given deductions exist; When I enter search criteria and click Search; Then only matching deductions are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can return to the full deductions list
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied a search filter; When I click Reset; Then the filters clear and all deductions are shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter deductions by category, so that I can review deductions belonging to a specific tax section
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Deductions screen; When I select a category from the Category dropdown; Then only deductions under that category are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter deductions by financial year, so that I see the deductions applicable to the selected year
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Deductions screen; When I select a financial year; Then only deductions configured for that year are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the deductions list, so that I can navigate all configured deductions
acceptance_criteria: Given there are more deductions than fit one page; When I use the next/last pagination controls; Then the corresponding page of deductions is displayed
